title: ICSI CSEET June 2026 Results Announced Today!
content:
# ICSI CSEET June 2026 Results Announced Today!

Ek important update hai Company Secretary aspirants ke liye. The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne Company Secretary Executive Entrance Test (CSEET) June 2026 session ke results declare karne ki announcement ki hai.

Here are the key details you need to know:
*   **Result Declaration Date:** July 15, 2026
*   **Declaration Time:** The results will be announced at 2:00 PM today.
*   **Access Mode:** Candidates can check their results along with subject-wise mark break-up on the official ICSI website.
*   **Result Statement:** A formal e-Result-cum-Marks Statement will be uploaded on the Institute's website. Please note, no physical copy of the Result-cum-Marks Statement will be issued to candidates.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/exam-results)

*Published on: 15 July 2026*
